title: Nebulus spiders for traveling
description: This mod adds 2 friendly spiders wich you are able to ride, while riding them you are able to climb walls.
body:
This mod adds 2 friendly spiders wich you are able to ride, while riding them you are able to climb walls.

 

**There are two versions available:**

- first one is the Forest Spider
- second  is the Nether Spider
  
**
The Forest Spider can be found in:**

- the forest
- birch forest
- dark forest
- all jungle bioms
- taiga bioms
- all plains bioms
- swamp biome
- mangrove swamp
- flower forest
- cherry grove
- meadow biome
 

The forest spider follow you, if you have a red mushroom in your hand

You will not find the forest spider in snowy biomes.

Forest spiders hate chicken pls keep this in mind.


**You can find the Nether Spider in:**

- nether wasteland
 

The nether spider follow you, if you have a crimson forest fungus in your hand

Nether spider hate wither skeletons, foxes, cats and frogs please remember this

 

**Additional information:**

Both of them are friendly to players.

Also you can climb with them.

If you travel with spiders you have a whole new experience.

You are able to use weapons wile you ride the spiders.

Both spiders are shy and run away if you want to keep them, you will better leashed them or locked them up, 

otherwise they will try to brake out.



 For mod showcase click [👉🏼here👈🏼](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ILqf6gAOkDU&t=198s)
